_comment: Transcript source URLs, keyed by quarter. This is DATA, not code -- a future Claude (or you) just adds the next quarter's block and points active_quarter at it. banks.py reads active_quarter and builds the bank list from the matching block. See README 'Run a new quarter (with Claude)'. Q2 2026 note: Motley Fool lagged the July prints, so Q2 uses Benzinga transcripts (fetch.py supports both hosts). WFC and C stay TODO: as of 2026-07-21 neither transcript is freely published anywhere parsable (Benzinga and Fool both skipped them; Seeking Alpha/Investing.com are login-walled). Their transcripts/<T>.txt are the 8-K EX-99.1 releases with a provenance header (placed manually, NOT via fetch.py) so extract/compare cover 7/7 -- if a free transcript posts, paste the URL here and re-run fetch/extract/compare for that ticker to upgrade it.
